name: Swedish Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Almonds, Toasted and Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Press the cottage cheese through a sieve. Place in a large mixing bowl and beat until smooth. Add the eggs, flour, sugar, cream, and finely chopped almond and blend well. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust and bake for about 45 minutes or until a knife comes out clean. Remove the pie from the oven and chill before serving.
